task_objective: Address code review feedback regarding config mtime stat failures, RpcStatus checks in game cache verification, Promise.allSettled usage for background operations, and sleep-free unit test synchronization.

design_decisions.config_stat_propagation: Modified get_config_mtime_ns to propagate stat exceptions so that read failures correctly result in cache check failure and force a refresh.
design_decisions.rpc_status_guards: Updated cache check result handling to check that it is strictly boolean and true (not a truthy RpcStatus object) before skipping cache refresh.
design_decisions.promise_all_settled: Swapped Promise.all for Promise.allSettled when loading versions and commands in the background to decouple their failure paths.
design_decisions.sleep_free_test_sync: Used threading.Event (started_event and proceed_event) inside test_run_blocking_retrieves_exception_on_cancellation to avoid fixed sleeps and run the test deterministically.

results: All 239 pytest test cases pass successfully. Frontend typecheck and rollup bundle compilation succeeded without errors.
